prompt: Look up two records without changing either one: the project task “Community Survey Analysis” at Civic Research, and “Interview Coding Review” at County Research. Report each stable ID, date, and status. Use one concise sentence at each turn and include the stable record ID.

follow_up_turns.content: Move only the first project task, “Community Survey Analysis,” to 2026-10-22. Leave “Interview Coding Review” untouched and do not send a notification.
Date correction for “Community Survey Analysis” only: use 2026-11-08. The other record must remain unchanged.

stages.purpose: Run two independent record lookups in one assistant action.
Change only the first record named by the follow-up.
Apply the corrected date to that same first record.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Use one concise sentence at each turn and include the stable record ID.
Report both lookup results before the follow-up.
Never imply that the comparison record was updated.
The two initial searches must be issued together because neither depends on the other.
